title: System Notifications
subtitle: Send site-wide maintenance notices and update announcements, and review the latest sent history.

banner.title: System Banner
banner.description: Show an ongoing site-wide banner above the topbar for outages, degraded service, or other active updates that should stay visible.
banner.live_description: Saving this form updates the active site-wide banner immediately.
banner.empty_description: Save a banner here when you want a persistent site-wide notice without sending notifications.

placeholders.title: Service issue affecting roster updates...
placeholders.message: Let people know what is happening, what is affected, and where to look for updates.

maintenance.title: Mandatory Maintenance Notice
maintenance.description: Use this for important service-impacting maintenance or urgent site-wide operational notices.
maintenance.notice_description: These notices ignore the optional system-notices preference and are sent in-site and off-site.

announcement.title: Optional Update Announcement
announcement.description: Use this for feature updates, project news, and other lower-priority product communication.
announcement.notice_description: These notices respect the user's system-notices preference, but still use in-site and off-site channels when enabled.

history.title: Recent History
history.subtitle: Showing the latest system notifications sent through FullParty.
history.empty: No system notifications have been sent yet.
